pi_items.source: Code analysis of verifier.py (line 57: if new_visits >= 100) and setup_task.sh (line 53: NUM_VISITS = 250 total visits generated)

Code analysis of setup_task.sh (line 118: INSERT INTO matomo_site WHERE idsite=1), export_result.sh (lines 18,21,25,28: queries WHERE idsite=1), and verifier.py (multiple queries filtering by idsite=1)
Direct code inspection: setup_task.sh line 55 sets OUTPUT_FILE to this exact path; task description (line 19) confirms the same path
Direct code inspection: export_result.sh line 36 sets RESULT_FILE_PATH to this exact path; task description (line 6) specifies creating file at this location
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 55-59 awards 30 points when new_visits >= 100
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 66-70 awards 10 bonus points when new_visits >= 200
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 72-78 awards 15 points when current_actions > 0 and current_actions >= new_visits
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 80-87 awards 15 points when recent_visits >= (new_visits * 0.9)
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 89-95 awards 10 points when parsed_ua_visits >= (new_visits * 0.9), corresponding to parsed browser/OS metadata
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 98-100 awards 10 points when result_file_exists is True
Verifier code analysis: verifier.py lines 102-113 awards 10 points when reported_count is within 30% tolerance of actual database delta

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task involves importing synthetic Apache access logs (~250 total visits) into Matomo Site ID 1. Logs are generated by an inline Python script in setup_task.sh with realistic elements (random IPs, various HTTP status codes, user agents, and timestamps spanning the last 7 days). The data is stored at /home/ga/Documents/access_logs/apache_access.log and the import result is written to /home/ga/Documents/access_logs/import_result.txt. Scoring uses 7 weighted criteria totaling 100 points: visits_imported (30), high_volume_bonus (10), actions_created (15), timestamps_correct (15), tracking_fields_present (10), result_file_exists (10), and result_file_accuracy (10). Success requires at least 100 visits to be imported and a minimum score of 60 points.
